AGENTS.md.purpose: agent workflow and source hierarchy contract

Game/eft2/.purpose: EFT2 s&box game project (eft2.sbproj); initial scaffold exists
Game/eft2/.mutation_rule: implementation guided by infrastructure tools; do not add mechanics until rails are stable

Maps/.purpose: canonical map domains and map analysis outputs
Maps/.mutation_rule: VMFs read-only; analysis writable by tools

Lua/.mutation_rule: do not mutate unless explicitly instructed

SBox/.mutation_rule: do not mutate or vendor into Game/

Tools/.mutation_rule: safe to edit tool code for current task

garrysmod-master/.mutation_rule: temporary reference only; remove after derived indexes are generated

FFmpeg-Builds-master/.mutation_rule: temporary reference only; remove after derived indexes are generated

source-sdk-2013-master/.mutation_rule: temporary reference only; remove after SOURCE_SDK_REFERENCE_INDEX.json generated

.gitignore.mutation_rule: do not edit from Indexer; recommend changes only
